messages.content: Make a skit with the song “We Did It” from Dora the Explorer with Dora singing about how they hid a dead body of a crime she commited, and at the end of the song, all characters calling the cops

Note: We do not condone or support the subject matter of this skit. We have created it solely for entertainment purposes and do not encourage or promote illegal activity.

*Dora and her friends are in the forest, digging a hole*

Dora: Come on guys, let's keep digging! We've got to hide this body.

Boots: Dora, I don't think we should be doing this.

Dora: Shut up, Boots! We did what we had to do, and now we have to get rid of the evidence.

Swiper: Yeah, but what if we get caught?

Dora: We won't get caught if we're smart about it. Now come on, keep digging!

*They finish burying the body and start to cover it with dirt*

Dora: We did it, we did it! We buried the evidence, we did it!

Boots: I don't feel good about this, Dora.

Dora: We had no choice, Boots. It was us or them.

Swiper: But what if they find out?

Dora: They won't find out. We're the only ones who know what happened.

*Sudden police sirens are heard*

Dora: Oh no, the cops! They found out!

Boots: Dora, we have to turn ourselves in. It's the right thing to do.

Dora: You're right, Boots. We have to come clean.

Swiper: But...but...what about the consequences?

Dora: We'll face the consequences together, Swiper. That's what friends do.

*They all gather their courage and call the police*

All: We did it! We did it! We hid the evidence, but now we admit it!

*The police arrive and the skit ends with Dora and her friends in handcuffs*

Now make just the song, and rewrite this: We did it!
We did it!
We did it!
Yay!
Lo hicimos!
We did it!

(Verse about the first event of the murder)
We did it!
We did it!
We did it!
Hooray!

(Verse about the tactics dora used to try to remove the evidence)
We did it!
We did it!
We did it!
We did it!

(Two verses about how Dora succeeded)

Yay!
Whoo!
Hooray!
We did it!

Note: Again, we do not condone or support the subject matter of this song. We have created it solely for entertainment purposes and do not encourage or promote illegal activity.

(Verse 1)
We did it!
We did it!
We hid the body and covered it!
Hooray!
We did it!
We did it!
No one will ever know what we did!

(Verse 2)
We did it!
We did it!
We cleaned up every little bit!
Hooray!
We did it!
We did it!
No way the cops will find us, not one bit!

(Verse 3)
We did it!
We did it!
We got away with this terrible hit!
Hooray!
We did it!
We did it!
Our secret is safe, every single bit!

(Outro)
Whoo!
Yay!
Hooray!
We did it!
Replace all the "We did it"s with lines

Note: We do not condone or support the subject matter of this song. We have created it solely for entertainment purposes and do not encourage or promote illegal activity.

(Verse 1)
Mission complete, we hid the body and covered it!
Hooray, success is ours, what a hit!
No one will ever know what we did, we did it!

(Verse 2)
Tactics employed, we cleaned up every little bit!
Hooray, we're so good at this, we'll never quit!
No way the cops will find us, not one bit, we did it!

(Verse 3)
Our plan realized, we got away with this terrible hit!
Hooray, we're so smart, we won't ever admit!
Our secret is safe, every single bit, we did it!

(Outro)
Whoo, we're the best at this game, what a feat!
Yay, we'll always stick together, no retreat!
Hooray, victory is ours, so sweet, we did it!
Now include methods of "removing" the evidence Dora tried.

Note: We do not condone or support the subject matter of this song. We have created it solely for entertainment purposes and do not encourage or promote illegal activity.

(Verse 1)
Mission complete, we hid the body and covered it!
Hooray, success is ours, what a hit!
We burn the clothes, and cleaned the scene, we did it!

(Verse 2)
Tactics employed, we cleaned up every little bit!
Hooray, we're so good at this, we'll never quit!
We bleach the floors, and scrub the walls, we did it!

(Verse 3)
Our plan realized, we got away with this terrible hit!
Hooray, we're so smart, we won't ever admit!
We set up an alibi, and burned the car, we did it!

(Outro)
Whoo, we're the best at this game, what a feat!
Yay, we'll always stick together, no retreat!
Hooray, victory is ours, so sweet, we did it!
Make a two lines for it

(Verse 1)
We hid the body, covered it with dirt
Burned the clothes, erased any trace of hurt

(Verse 2)
Cleaned up the mess, left no sign
Set up alibi, now we're just fine

(Verse 3)
Our plan succeeded, we got away
No one will find us, no matter what they say

(Outro)
We're on top, we did it well
Our secret stays safe, let's never tell.

Make a variation for: Yeah, we hid the body 
Admit it!

Note: We do not condone or support the subject matter of this variation. We have created it solely for entertainment purposes and do not encourage or promote illegal activity.

(Verse 1)
Oh yes, we hid the body without a doubt
Covered it up, no one will find out

(Verse 2)
We took action and made a plan
Erased all evidence, left no man

(Verse 3)
We may have done something bad, it's true
Our secret will remain hidden, what we must do

(Outro)
We'll never admit it, our lips are sealed
Our victory is ours, we've won this field.
Something as a line rhyming with We did it!
We're so slick, we did it quick!
Something as two words rhyming with We did it!  (Admit it)
We'll never quit it, we did it!
Opposite of Admit
Conceal.
Word rhyming with "Hooray" related to the premise of the song.
Okay, how about "flee" as a word related to the theme of the song? It rhymes with "Hooray" and it could relate to the idea of escaping or running away from the crime that was committed.
What else
Another word related to the theme of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "getaway". It also emphasizes the idea of escaping without being caught or punished for the crime.
ANother

Another word related to the theme of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "betray". It could relate to the idea of someone revealing their involvement in the crime and betraying their accomplices.
Another

Another word related to the premise of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "obey". It could relate to the idea of following orders or instructions to carry out the crime, and could imply a certain sense of loyalty or obedience amongst the accomplices.
Another

Another word related to the theme of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "okay". It could relate to the idea of putting on a facade of normality or calmness despite having committed a crime, and could add a tone of chilling uncanniness to the song.
Another

Another word related to the premise of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "safer way". It could relate to the idea of the perpetrators choosing to take a safer and more calculated approach to carrying out the crime to avoid being caught or facing consequences.
Another

Another word related to the theme of the song that rhymes with "Hooray" could be "getaway car". It could emphasize the importance of having a vehicle that would help the perpetrators escape quickly and smoothly after committing the crime.
